---
name: New skill request
about: Propose a new QA skill for QIOS
title: "[Skill Request] "
labels: enhancement, skill
assignees: ""
---

## Skill proposal

Provide a short name and summary for the proposed skill.

## Problem to solve

What QA task is currently missing or not well covered?

## Why an existing skill is not enough

Explain why this should be a new skill instead of an improvement to an existing one.

## Proposed triggers

List realistic request phrases that should activate this skill.

- 
- 
- 

## Expected inputs

What kind of input should the skill accept?

Examples:
- API spec
- user story
- acceptance criteria
- test data rules

## Expected outputs

What concrete deliverable should the skill produce?

Examples:
- test cases
- collection
- `.feature` file
- automation scaffold

## Risk and value

- Primary value:
- Main QA risk addressed:
- Target users: QA / SDET / BA / Tech Lead / Other

## References or examples

Add standards, examples, or comparable workflows if available.

## Additional context

Anything else needed to evaluate the request.
